metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by mcules.

plugins.name: todo-buffer
plugins.description: Frictionless personal todo capture into a single markdown file. Intercepts `todo:` / `todo!` prompts via hook, supports listing and Jira-ticket handoff via skill.

plugins.name: create-jira-task
plugins.description: Turn a rough request into a full Jira ticket via the Atlassian MCP. Two-phase flow (proposal → per-ticket confirmation → create). Project, fields, language convention, SP matrix and split thresholds are configured per-repo via `.claude/create-jira-task.json`.
